wiki.extract: Amy's Kitchen, Inc., doing business as Amy's, is a family-owned, privately held American company based in Petaluma, California, that manufactures organic and non-GMO convenience and frozen foods. Founded in 1987 by Andy and Rachel Berliner, and incorporated in 1988, the company took its name from their daughter, Amy. All of Amy's 250+ products are vegetarian and made with organic ingredients. The company has also operated vegetarian fast food restaurants in California under the name Amy's Drive Thru.

recalls.productName: Gluten Free Bean & Rice Burrito. 12 retail units per case. 5.5oz/retail unit.  UPC code 042272003525. Frozen.
